strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure—exceeds the 15-year minimum
Currently Staff Software Engineer with direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator frameworks, indicating recent pivot into AI focus
Strong track record building and shipping products: GISCollective (open-source GIS platform used by Green Map), Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner; demonstrates platform-building capability
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms—the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' and the resume shows only recent/vague involvement with MCP and AI-agent infrastructure without substantive examples
Missing preferred qualification: no Master's or PhD in AI-related field; education is BS Computer Science and BS in Fine Arts/Photography
No evidence of cloud platform strategy work or strategic customer advisory on cloud/AI adoption—key responsibilities of this Principal role
response.justification: Bogdan meets baseline experience and education requirements with 20 years in software engineering and a BS in CS, and is currently at Staff Engineer (director-level IC). He demonstrates solid product-building capability through GISCollective and open-source libraries, and his current role includes AI infrastructure work. However, the role explicitly targets director-level expertise in AI strategy, and the resume shows no concrete AI/ML products, publications, or demonstrated deep expertise in machine learning or AI platforms—only recent, undetailed involvement with MCP tooling. The absence of Master's/PhD in AI (preferred) and no evidence of cloud platform strategy or customer advisory on AI adoption further underscore a gap between his current breadth and the specialized AI strategy focus required.
